data.name: 少女妖精弹珠台 Elf Girl Pinball
data.detailed_description:
遊戲簡介
在茂密的樹林中，發現了一間妖精少女們經營的遊戲屋。本以為只是個普通的彈珠遊戲而已嘛~可是玩過才知道...竟然是與妖精少女們一起玩耍的彈珠遊戲~~~！ ！ ！

遊戲玩法
彈珠台遊戲的操作方法，操作簡單，上手容易,彈射彈珠與妖精玩耍。
賺取金幣解鎖更多內容與互動。

遊戲特色
遊戲的趣味性強。
與妖精少女的互動性多樣。
動態cg與序列幀動畫相結合。
上手容易但隨機性強。

data.short_description: 不僅僅只是“非常快樂”的彈珠台遊戲~！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 法文, 德文, 俄文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: windows7+ 64-bit
  • 處理器: i3-6100
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 650
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: NVIDIA

data.name: 少女妖精弹珠台 Elf Girl Pinball
data.detailed_description:
Introduction to the game
In the dense forest, I found a game house run by elf girls. I thought it was just an ordinary pinball game~ But after playing it, I realized... It turned out to be a pinball game played with elf girls~~~! ! !

Gameplay
The operation method of the pinball game is simple to operate, easy to use, and play with the balls and elf girls.
Earn coins to unlock more content and interactions.

Game Features
The game is very interesting.
There are various interactions with elf girls.
Dynamic cg combined with sequence frame animation.
Easy to get started but random.

data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Russian, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: windows7+ 64-bit
  • Processor: i3-6100
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 650
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: NVIDIA
